title: conyza uliginosa var. hirsuta
intro: Conyza uliginosa var. hirsuta, also known as rough fleabane, is a variant of the Conyza uliginosa plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful in treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Conyza uliginosa var. hirsuta include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis. Conyza uliginosa var. hirsuta can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and combat infections.
